# License and Copyright Information

- Make sure every file has an SPDX-License-Identifier at the beginning of the file.

- Make sure every file has a copyright statement at the beginning of the file.

# Content Guidelines

- Make sure text is written in British English.

# File and Directory Naming Conventions

- Use lower case characters for file and directory names.

- Separate parts in file and directory names with dashes (`-`).
